arts.ttl: Fiorentina forward Moise Kean aims to top both scoring and music charts as he releases first album
arts.sum: Fiorentina forward Moise Kean is aiming to top both the scoring charts and the music charts. However, in his three years back at Juventus, Kean totaled just 22 goals and three assists in 123 appearances.

arts.ttl: Preview: Bologna vs. Fiorentina - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Serie A clash between Bologna and Fiorentina, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Bologna are coming off a 2-2 draw against Juventus after poor game management cost them an initial 2-0 lead they had earned by dominating the game out of possession with a ferocious high press for lar...
